comment: Quality Gates catalog — code dimension. Schema spec: quality/catalogs/README.md. Verifier impl: quality/gates/code/. Reports: quality/reports/verifications/code/.

sources: scripts/check_clippy_lint_loaded.sh (migrated to quality/gates/code/clippy-lint-loaded.sh per SIMPLIFY-04 P58 Wave C)

asserts: clippy.toml lists each of: reqwest::Client::new, reqwest::Client::builder, reqwest::ClientBuilder::new under [disallowed-methods]
no source file outside crates/reposix-core/src/http.rs constructs reqwest::Client / reqwest::ClientBuilder directly

rows.owner_hint: if RED: clippy.toml is missing or has been edited to drop a reqwest entry; OR a new file constructs reqwest::Client directly outside http.rs (security regression — see CLAUDE.md threat-model § 'Outbound HTTP allowlist')

asserts: the most recent ci.yml `test` job for the current branch exited 0
POLISH-CODE P58-stub: this row documents what ci.yml ALREADY enforces; full per-row enforcement is P63 final

rows.owner_hint: if RED: ci.yml `test` job is failing — investigate workflow logs at gh run view <run-id>

waiver.reason: POLISH-CODE P58-stub: this row documents ci.yml's existing enforcement; the verifier wrapper is a thin shim. Full per-row enforcement (running cargo test from this verifier) is deferred to P63 final per .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md § POLISH-CODE.

asserts: the most recent ci.yml `fmt` job for the current branch exited 0
POLISH-CODE P58-stub: this row documents what ci.yml ALREADY enforces; full per-row enforcement is P63 final

rows.owner_hint: if RED: cargo fmt regressed; run cargo fmt --all locally

waiver.reason: POLISH-CODE P58-stub: this row documents ci.yml's existing enforcement; the verifier wrapper is a thin shim. Full per-row enforcement (running cargo fmt from this verifier) is deferred to P63 final per .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md § POLISH-CODE.

sources: scripts/check_fixtures.py (migrated to quality/gates/code/check-fixtures.py per SIMPLIFY-05 P58 Wave C, Option A)

asserts: github_issues.json: 4-12 KB JSON array, >=3 issues, required keys present, no credential-shaped strings
confluence_pages.json: 6-16 KB JSON object with results[], >=3 pages, ADF body re-parseable, no secrets/PII
fixtures/README.md: contains required terms (offline, content_hash, github_issues.json, confluence_pages.json, synthetic)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: a benchmark fixture file has been edited (added secrets, dropped required keys, drifted size). Investigate via `python3 quality/gates/code/check-fixtures.py` locally; do NOT silence.

asserts: cargo fmt --all -- --check exits 0 (no formatting drift in any workspace crate)

rows.owner_hint: if RED: cargo fmt regressed; run cargo fmt --all locally and commit the result

waiver.reason: P60 Wave A catalog-first; verifier wrapper ships in P60 Wave D (SIMPLIFY-10 pre-push hook one-liner). Until Wave D, the runner returns NOT-VERIFIED on missing verifier; this short-lived waiver keeps pre-push GREEN through the implementation window. Pattern from quality/SURPRISES.md 2026-04-27 P58 row 2 (clippy-lint-loaded P58 Wave A waiver).

rows.owner_hint: if RED: a new clippy violation; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --fix to auto-fix where possible. Pivot rule: if cargo clippy in pre-push exceeds 60s on warm cache, P60 Wave E may move it OUTSIDE the runner; the row stays catalogued but the pre-push hook chains it externally. Document in SURPRISES.md.

waiver.reason: P60 Wave A catalog-first; verifier wrapper ships in P60 Wave D (SIMPLIFY-10 pre-push hook one-liner). Until Wave D, the runner returns NOT-VERIFIED on missing verifier; this short-lived waiver keeps pre-push GREEN through the implementation window. Pattern from quality/SURPRISES.md 2026-04-27 P58 row 2 (clippy-lint-loaded P58 Wave A waiver).
